title: Arm Holdings to Face US Antitrust Probe Over Chip Tech
description: Arm Holdings Plc is facing an antitrust investigation by the US Federal Trade Commission over the UK company’s licensing of its semiconductor technology, part of ongoing global scrutiny of the business, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Forbright Files for IPO Pitching Middle Market, Digital Banking
description: Forbright Inc., a financial services platform that focuses on middle-market lending and digital consumer banking, filed for an initial public offering showing growing deposits.

title: From Trade to Taiwan, What the Trump-Xi Summit Did (and Didn’t) Accomplish
description: On today’s Big Take podcast: President Trump’s summit with Xi Jinping offered good optics, but gave little indication of progress on major sticking points.
